policy: Capabilities must be separated into implemented artifacts versus production-verified evidence.

capabilities.capability: Project, milestone, task, evidence, approval and closure chain
capabilities.production_evidence_required: Executable workflow test against staging Supabase with real roles and audit trail review.

capabilities.capability: OVR submission, supervisor/HOD review, Quality review, corrective action and closure path
capabilities.production_evidence_required: End-to-end OVR test with patient-sensitive-field access restrictions and Quality-only closure proof.

capabilities.capability: No silent mock/demo/fallback rows in production runtime
capabilities.production_evidence_required: Empty database browser test and failed-query browser test proving empty/error states, not fictional records.

capabilities.capability: Login/session shell and protected route access
capabilities.production_evidence_required: Anonymous access denied, current user profile loaded, inactive user blocked, role-based navigation confirmed.
Executable SQL persona tests for employee, manager, quality, audit, super admin and negative access cases.

capabilities.capability: Unit, integration and browser workflow tests
capabilities.production_evidence_required: CI run with Vitest/RTL/Playwright and disposable Supabase test database.

capabilities.capability: Database, Storage and Auth recovery procedures
capabilities.production_evidence_required: Signed restore dry-run to staging with table counts, Storage sample verification and smoke test.

capabilities.capability: Bilingual Arabic/English UI with RTL layout
capabilities.production_evidence_required: Screen-by-screen Arabic QA, untranslated string audit and accessibility review.
Real staging load test, query pagination proof and route lazy-loading browser measurements.
